dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8713 IH: Railcar Accident Placard Integrity and Durability for Responders Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mrs. Sykes (for herself and Mr. Rulli) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure

form.official-title: To direct the Secretary of Transportation to require certain specifications for safety placards, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Railcar Accident Placard Integrity and Durability for Responders Act of 2026 or the RAPID Responders Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Not later than 1 year after the date of enactment of this Act, the Secretary of Transportation shall issue regulations to require that placards covered under section 172.519 of title 49, Code of Federal Regulations, be able to withstand heat in excess of 180 degrees.
The Secretary may, upon recommendation from the National Transportation Safety Board, issue such regulations as are necessary to increase the heat threshold described in subsection (a).
